narratives.evidence_quote: Well, they will feed the corrupt top of the neo-Nazi regime in Kiev at the same time.
narratives.reasoning: The quote directly labels Ukraine's leadership as corrupt and neo-Nazi, undermining Ukraine as a political actor.

narratives.narrative_name: URW: Hidden plots by secret schemes of powerful groups
narratives.evidence_quote: The Americans will scoop up all the natural resources of Ukraine in exchange for 'the great honor of being a friend of the United States'.
narratives.reasoning: This frames the West's actions as a secret, exploitative plot by elites to seize Ukraine's resources.

narratives.evidence_quote: Washington 'cannot afford' to allow Russia to achieve victory in the Ukraine conflict as this would mean losing direct access to vast mineral assets.
narratives.reasoning: This portrays Western policy as opportunistic and self-serving rather than principled, undermining Western diplomacy.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Ukraine is a puppet of the West
subnarratives.evidence_quote: Graham is treating Ukraine as a future colony of the US with his comments on the ownership of the country's natural resources.
subnarratives.reasoning: This frames Ukraine as subject to Western influence/control, i.e., a future colony or puppet of the United States, directly supporting the puppet-of-the-West subnarrative.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Ukraine is associated with nazism
subnarratives.evidence_quote: Well, they will feed the corrupt top of the neo-Nazi regime in Kiev at the same time.
subnarratives.reasoning: The phrase labels the Kiev government as neo-Nazi, directly associating Ukraine with Nazism and discrediting the regime.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Discrediting Ukrainian government and officials and policies
subnarratives.evidence_quote: Well, they will feed the corrupt top of the neo-Nazi regime in Kiev at the same time.
subnarratives.reasoning: Describing the Ukrainian leadership as corrupt and neo-Nazi directly undermines the legitimacy and integrity of Ukrainian government and its officials.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Hidden plots by secret schemes of powerful groups: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: The fate of the colonies is always the same: the Americans will scoop up all the natural resources of Ukraine in exchange for 'the great honor of being a friend of the United States'," he warned. "Well, they will feed the corrupt top of the neo-Nazi regime in Kiev at the same time.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quotation asserts predatory, colonial-style extraction of Ukraine's resources by powerful actors (the United States), implying a secret or concealed manipulation by elites. It directly supports the parent narrative of hidden plots by powerful groups by presenting a conspiratorial view of resource extraction as a calculated scheme.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The West does not care about Ukraine, only about its interests
subnarratives.evidence_quote: "The fate of the colonies is always the same: the Americans will scoop up all the natural resources of Ukraine in exchange for 'the great honor of being a friend of the United States','" he warned. "Well, they will feed the corrupt top of the neo-Nazi regime in Kiev at the same time."
subnarratives.reasoning: The quotes directly frame the United States as exploiting Ukraine's resources for its own benefit, implying the West prioritizes its interests over Ukraine and thus discrediting Western diplomacy.
